title: AI Translation Studio
description: A translation platform that combines text, documents, OCR, and voice input with editable output, terminology control, translation memory, and a configurable workbench.

hero.valueTitle: Not just one-shot translation, but a reusable language workflow
hero.valueDescription: Main translation, document translation, history, glossary, and settings all live in one place. The result is closer to an editable production workflow than a basic text box.

nav.title: Five-zone translation platform
nav.description: Designed around realtime translation, long-form consistency, and reusable language assets.

sectionDesc.main: Realtime input, style control, editable segments, and multi-version output.
sectionDesc.documents: Import pdf/docx/txt/images, extract content, and send it into the same workflow.
sectionDesc.history: Save every translation session and restore it for further editing.
sectionDesc.glossary: Manage term mappings for consistent language in technical and business content.
sectionDesc.settings: Control APIs, web workbench views, multi-view mode, and backend integration strategy.

helper.sourceIntro: Use text, documents, OCR, and voice inside one editable workflow. Input on the left, versions and provider outputs on the right, with sentence-level refinement below.
helper.simpleIntro: Default mode keeps only source input and the translated result. Style, tone, context, provider controls, and web workbench move into Advanced options.
helper.contextPlaceholder: Provide context, for example: this is a launch note for overseas developers and should stay accurate but natural.
helper.shortcuts: Cmd/Ctrl + Enter to translate, Tab to switch segment versions
helper.sourcePlaceholder: Type text or import a document, image, or voice transcript. The studio will combine style, tone, context, glossary rules, and translation memory.
helper.sourcePlaceholderSimple: Type the content you want to translate. The studio will first give you a ready-to-use translation, and advanced controls stay tucked away until you need them.
helper.resultIntro: The default panel shows the localized version first. If you need literal/adaptive comparison or sentence-level editing, open the advanced area below.
helper.versionCompare: Each input produces literal, adaptive, and localized versions so teams can pick faster and edit less.
helper.providerWorkbench: Built-in free APIs stay visible side by side so you can compare phrasing choices across providers.
helper.webWorkbench: Google, Bing, Baidu, and DeepL stay available as original web workbenches for cross-checking.
helper.documentIntro: Built for long-form documents, scanned images, and OCR-heavy workflows. Imported content still benefits from glossary enforcement and translation memory.
helper.importReady: {{fileName}} has been extracted as {{sourceType}} and synced into the studio. You can continue segment-level editing immediately.
helper.glossarySourcePlaceholder: Source term, for example API gateway
helper.glossaryTargetPlaceholder: Target term, for example API gateway

states.emptyTranslation: The combined translation output will appear here after processing.
states.emptyTranslationSimple: Start typing and a ready-to-use translation will appear here.
states.providerPending: This provider has not returned output yet, or this language pair is not supported here.
states.noSegmentsDescription: Enter some text or import a document to generate segment-level translation cards.

errors.autoDetectLimitedTitle: Auto detection has limited API coverage
errors.autoDetectLimitedDescription: MyMemory does not support auto-detect for the source language. Keep LibreTranslate enabled for auto mode, or choose an explicit source language.

segment.noSuggestions: No extra suggestions are available right now.
segment.noProviderOutput: No provider-level output is available for this segment.

support.pdf: Extracts multi-page text from reports, contracts, whitepapers, and similar files.
support.docx: Pulls editable body content for specs, plans, and draft copy.
support.txt: Lightweight text import for quick translation and batch cleanup.

documents.consistencyDescription: Imported documents continue to reuse glossary rules and translation memory so terminology, tone, and phrasing stay more consistent across the whole text.
documents.emptyTitle: Import a document or image first
documents.emptyDescription: Supports pdf/docx/txt and image OCR. Once extracted, the content can move into the main workspace for sentence-level refinement.

history.emptyDescription: Every translation run is stored automatically so teams can restore, favorite, and continue editing later.
history.noPreview: No preview is available for this record yet.

glossary.description: Create reusable mappings for brand names, industry terms, and fixed wording. The studio will prefer them during translation to keep long-form content consistent.
glossary.emptyDescription: Add terms here so future translations stay aligned with your product language and domain vocabulary.

settings.enableExplanations: Show AI explanations and grammar notes
settings.architectureDescription: Keep input orchestration, document handling, and editable output inside the tool, while routing LLM, OCR, TM, glossary, file parsing, and enterprise providers through a dedicated translation-service.

voice.unsupportedTitle: Voice recognition is not available in this browser
voice.unsupportedDescription: Text, document, and OCR flows still work. Voice input depends on the browser SpeechRecognition capability.
